name: vibe-cartographer
description: Vibe Cartographer — plot your course from idea to shipped app. Vibe coding course correction delivered as slash commands: onboard, scope, prd, spec, checklist, build, iterate, reflect, evolve-cart, vitals, friction, coder-voice, tend.
author: 626Labs LLC

port.notes: Manifest mirrors the Claude Code plugin.json version. Read by vibe-cartographer-session-logger/vibe-cartographer-friction-logger for the plugin_version audit field. Antigravity discovers workflows from .agent/workflows/ and skills from .agent/skills/ — this file is a port-bookkeeping manifest, not a discovery requirement.
